meaning: n.瀹屾垚,鍦嗘弧鎴愬姛,鎴愬氨
examples: The paintings are the consummation of his life's work.
How lets the effect which the surgery treats achieve the consummation, perfect.
Merit at its highest, in its consummation, is to really know oneself, to be without dukkha.
The closing of the transaction is also contingent on the consummation of Sprint's previously announced transaction with SoftBank.
Consummation is also subject to satisfying customary closing conditions, including required regulatory approvals.
